item.title: [缺少] [半仙半死] Half Baked 1998 1080p BluRay DDP5.1 x264-ZoroSenpai[半仙半死 / 抢救肯尼小子 | 类别：喜剧 犯罪][12.36 GB][anonymous]
item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Fri, 24 Apr 2026 04:15:36 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=289551

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　抢救肯尼小子/�料�宝
◎片　　名　Half Baked
◎年　　代　1998
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　喜剧 / 犯罪
◎语　　言　英语
◎预算票房　$8,000,000 / $17,460,020
◎上映日期　1998-01-16
◎MPAA评级　R(美国)
◎IMDb评分　6.7/10 from 55,618 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0120693/
◎豆瓣评分　7.7/10 from 564 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/1294585/
◎片　　长　82分钟

◎标　　签　喜剧 | 飞片儿 | 美国 | 大麻 | 飞完在看 | 飞 | 美国电影 | 毒品
◎简　　介
　　肯尼意外地用从麦奇跑买来的食物喂了一只患有糖尿病的警察的马，结果杀死了它。之后，他被关进了监狱，并获得了100万美元的保释金。其余的人必须在讨厌的内特找到肯尼之前把他保释出来。该组织决定出售瑟古德在一家制药实验室做门卫的大麻。他们与说唱明星Sir Smoke-A-Lot以及毒贩Samson Simpson的竞争对手成为朋友。另一方面，瑟古德寻求玛丽·简的爱，她是一个反大麻的商人的女儿。接下来是典型的瘾君子行为和大量的配角。仔细观察。

引用 Half Baked 1998 1080p BluRay DD+5.1 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Half.Baked.1998.1080p.BluRay.DDP5.1.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Named)
Source(1).......: USA Kino Lorber 1080p BluRay REMUX AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1-BLURANiUM (Thanks @maniac!) (Video, Audios, Commentary, Subtitles, Chapters)
Source(2).......: AUS Umbrella Entertainment 1080p BluRay REMUX AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1-PmP (Thanks!) (Comparison)
Source(3).......: 1080p AMZN WEB-DL DD+ 5.1 H.264-SiGMA (Thanks!) (Comparison)
Source(4).......: iTunes, Viaplay WEB (Thanks!) (Subtitles)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison (More Comparison) || Comparison

▣ The USA KL BD has the better master & background PQ among all of the different masters. Hope it gets a proper good 4K restoration upgrade one day. Anyway, for this one, the atrocious dirt lines were manually fixed. The source doesn't have much or any grain, so to prevent banding and blocking, light grain was added based on that masking.  

▣ For further info, please check the remux notes. The Romanian subtitle was by @RedSpider, the Greek subtitle was from @HDB, the Serbian subtitle was from @CtrlHD & the Chinese subtitle was from @zimuku. Named chapters are from the USA HD-DVD, and used the QP file to ensure chapters on IDR frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!

item.description:
🔗 来源: hdhome

📅 发布时间: Fri, 24 Apr 2026 03:13:01 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=289546

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　克里斯蒂
◎片　　名　Christy
◎年　　代　2025
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情 / 传记 / 运动
◎语　　言　英语
◎预算票房　$15,000,000 / $0
◎上映日期　2025-09-05(多伦多电影节) / 2025-11-07(美国)
◎IMDb评分　6.0/10 from 8,975 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt32323252/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/36886334/
◎简　　介
　　影片讲述美国著名拳击运动员、“女洛奇”克里斯蒂·马丁的故事。克里斯蒂来自美国西弗吉尼亚州小镇一个相对保守的家庭，当时她作为一个年轻的女同性恋者不被允许做自己，所以用拳击作为表达自己和愤怒的工具。她必须在生活中做出一些危险而根本的妥协，其中最严重的是嫁给一个极其危险的男人。

　　1989年，马丁遇到了她的经纪人、后来的丈夫吉姆·马丁，生活发生了转变。她打破界限，成为第一个与金牌拳击推广人唐·金签约的女性，也是唯一一个登上《体育画报》封面的女拳击手。

　　克里斯蒂的魅力、漂亮外表和对赛场的适应为她赢得了狂热的粉丝群，并推动她成为次中量级冠军。但在精心塑造的公众形象背后，她面临着个人内心的恶魔、有毒的人际关系以及一次致命的谋杀事件。

引用 Christy 2025 1080p BluRay DD+5.1 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Christy.2025.1080p.BluRay.DDP5.1.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Numbered)
Source(1).......: GBR Black Bear 1080p Blu-ray AVC TrueHD 5.1-iNTEGRUM (Thanks!) (Video, Audio, Chapters)
Source(2).......: 2160p AMZN WEB-DL DD+ 5.1 H.265-FLUX (Thanks!) (Comparison)
Source(3).......: 1080p AMZN WEB-DL DD+ 5.1 H.264-FLUX (Thanks!) (Comparison)
Source(4).......: Amazon, iTunes, HBO Max WEB (Thanks @squash, @C76, @!) (Comparison)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison || Comparison

▣ The GBR BD has better PQ than the AMZN 4K WEB; the AMZN 4K WEB has chunky grain, flat areas & banding, which is not suitable for a hybrid option & also GBR BD has consistently good grain, so GBR BD was used as the source. The dirt lines were fixed, and the intro frames were filtered. The subtitles were collected from all sources. An end-credit chapter was added. The Romanian subtitle was taken from the TSG@speedapp release. Used the QP file to ensure chapters on IDR frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!

◎译　　名　宽恕 / 赦し / December
◎上映日期　2023-03-18
◎产　　地　Japan
◎类　　别　惊悚
◎语　　言　ja
◎时　　长　99分钟
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt17703204/

◎TMDb链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/985517
◎TMDb评分  7/10 from 4 users
◎导　　演　Anshul Chauhan
◎主　　演　尚玄
　　　　  　古谷仁
　　　　  　松浦凉
　　　　  　生津徹
　　　　  　藤森慎吾
　　　　  　Takuzo Shimizu
　　　　  　真矢美纪
　　　　  　Takashi Kawaguchi
　　　　  　Saya Suzuki
　　　　  　成海花音

◎简　　介

　　樋口胜对于女儿在七年前被杀害一事无法释怀而终日酗酒，得知罪犯福田夏奈即将获得再审机会并可能无罪释放后，他联络已再婚的前妻澄子，希望能一起配合审理，审判期间，两人旧情复燃引发一场婚外情，审判重新揭开旧伤疤，迫使双方面对令人不安的真相。

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=289541

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　逝去登山者的旅馆/Отель «У погибшего альпиниста»/The Dead Mountaineer Hotel
◎片　　名　Hukkunud Alpinisti hotel
◎年　　代　1979
◎产　　地　苏联
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　科幻 / 犯罪
◎语　　言　爱沙尼亚语
◎上映日期　1979-08-27
◎IMDb评分　6.6/10 from 1,977 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0204526/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/3278741/
◎片　　长　80分钟
◎简　　介
　　SYNOPSIS

　　Urgently called, the police inspector has arrived in a hotel, and didn't find any crime, but noticed some strangenesses occurring there. He has decided to leave, but a snow avalanche is crushed in the mountains, making it impossible for him to leave. Soon, inspector has found a body of a dead lodger. Everyone who lives in the hotel is under suspicion... (Strugatsky Brothers website)

　　NOTES

　　This is a crime / mystery thriller with surreal and psychedelic science fiction overtones based on a book Inspector Glebsky's Puzzle by the Strugatsky brothers. The screenplay was also written by the brothers and it differs from the book. The less you know about the movie the better starting point you have. The film is based largely on the mystery of what's happening to the people of Dead Mountaineer's Hotel. Is everything what it seems? Who's dead or who's not?

引用 Dead Mountaineer's Hotel AKA 'Hukkunud Alpinisti' hotell 1979 1080p BluRay FLAC 2.0 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Dead.Mountaineers.Hotel.1979.1080p.BluRay.FLAC2.0.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Named)
Source(1).......: USA Deaf Crocodile 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 2.0-PIXELPOLICE (Thanks @leftyenright!) (Video, Audio, Commentary, Subtitle)
Source(2).......: GER Camera Obscura 1080p BluRay REMUX AVC FLAC 2.0-BLURANiUM (Thanks @Kruppe!) (Subtitle, Chapters)
Source(3).......: 1080p Vimeo WEB-DL AAC 2.0 H.264-KnightsOfNi (Thanks @catsouce!) (Subtitles)
Source(4).......: Tallinnfilm PAL DVD5 (Thanks Dagnir@KG!)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison (Other Comparison) || Audio Comparison || Screenshot Comparison

▣ The three sources have three different masters. The new USA release is a new 4K restoration from a new 4K interpositive scan by Craig Rogers and Michael Coronado for Deaf Crocodile and color grade by Tyler Fagerstrom. It has better grain, different frame positioning, more coverage & actual 1080p details throughout, so overall, the new USA BD was used for this encode. The source has 440 pixel dark bars at the left and right borders, except for one intro credit screen. To keep all contents after cropping, the credit screen was resized.

▣ The USA BD audio is overall better & has a better dynamic range, so it was chosen; the audio was not dual-mono.

▣ The English subtitles were OCR'ed & checked by @PTer, & Chinese subtitles were taken from @zimukru. The German subtitle was OCR'ed & checked by me. The Portuguese & Spanish subtitles were taken from @r0nnie encode. The Romanian subtitle was by @TOM. The named chapters from the GER BD release, & used the QP file to ensure chapters on IDR frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!

◎译　　名　双狙人2 / Sniper 2
◎上映日期　2004-03-26
◎产　　地　Hungary, United States of America
◎类　　别　动作
◎语　　言　en
◎时　　长　91分钟
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0338450/
◎豆瓣链接  https://movie.douban.com/subject/1308260/
◎TMDb链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/14245
◎TMDb评分  5.557/10 from 159 users
◎导　　演　Craig R. Baxley
◎主　　演　汤姆·贝伦杰
　　　　  　博基姆·伍德拜恩
　　　　  　丹·巴特勒
　　　　  　林登·阿什比
　　　　  　艾丽卡·莫露珊
　　　　  　Puskás Tamás
　　　　  　Can Togay
　　　　  　Barna Illyés
　　　　  　Ferenc Kovács
　　　　  　Dennis Hayden

◎简　　介

　　步入中年的贝奇曾是海军陆战队的军士长，退伍后却一直不得志。某天，军中以一项秘密任务为由，希望他到巴尔干半岛枪杀一名叛军首领。贝奇需要优秀的观测兵，而军方派给他的却是年轻的军中死刑犯柯尔。两人到了目的地之后，顺利地达成任务，但贝奇竟然意外地遭敌方逮捕。此时贝奇才发现，他的任务根本是个幌子。

📄 原文内容:

引用 HDDolby官组作品，源站种子ID：237798，感谢原制作者发布。




◎译　　名　双狙人3 / Sniper 3
◎上映日期　2005-02-24
◎产　　地　United States of America
◎类　　别　剧情 / 动作 / 惊悚
◎语　　言　en
◎时　　长　91分钟
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0408196/
◎豆瓣链接  https://movie.douban.com/subject/1340361/
◎TMDb链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/14247
◎TMDb评分  5.448/10 from 126 users
◎导　　演　P.J. Pesce
◎主　　演　汤姆·贝伦杰
　　　　  　文峰
　　　　  　丹尼斯·阿尔恩特
　　　　  　约翰·多曼
　　　　  　Troy Winbush
　　　　  　珍妮塔·阿内特
　　　　  　William Duffy
　　　　  　努弗恩·布艾
　　　　  　ดอม เหตระกูล
　　　　  　Govit Vattanakun

◎简　　介

　　狙击手比吉特是海军陆战队的绝密武器，“一粒子弹、一条人命”是他的座右铭。在他那悠长又极富趣味性的职业生涯里，肯定已有超过七十条人命被他夺走。身为美国海军陆战队最具传奇性的狙击手，他每一次的任务是精确地瞄准、然后扣下狙击长枪的板机，一颗子弹从远距离飞至夺走一个毒犯/战犯/刺客/国家敌人的"贱命"。但今次，他的枪口却被逼瞄向他的一个朋友……

📄 原文内容:

引用 UBits官组作品，感谢原制作者发布。




❁ 片　　名:　英雄三元里
❁ 译　　名:　Hero Sanyuanli
❁ 年　　代:　2025
❁ 产　　地:　中国大陆
❁ 类　　别:　剧情 / 历史 / 战争 / 古装
❁ 语　　言:　汉语普通话
❁ 上映日期:　2025-11-28(中国大陆)
❁ 豆瓣评分:　0 / 10 from 0 users
❁ 豆瓣链接:　https://movie.douban.com/subject/37395403/
❁ 片　　长:　119分钟
❁ 导　　演:　王一诺 Yinuo Wang
❁ 编　　剧:　王一诺 Yinuo Wang
❁ 主　　演:　严屹宽 Yikuan Yan
　　　　　　　刘秋实 Qiushi Liu
　　　　　　　孙昊 Hao Sun
　　　　　　　闻雨 Yu Wen
　　　　　　　王光辉 Guanghui Wang
　　　　　　　孙蛟龙 Jiaolong Sun
　　　　　　　陶奕希 Yixi Tao
　　　　　　　方洋飞 Yangfei Fang
　　　　　　　文东俊 Dongjun Wen
　　　　　　　李圣雄 Shengxiong Li
　　　　　　　吕文军 Wenjun Lv
　　　　　　　马铁摩 Temur Mamisashvili

❁ 简　　介

　1840年鸦片战争爆发，英军侵略军攻破广州，饱经鸦片毒害的百姓活在至暗时刻。萧岗士绅何玉成（严屹宽饰）受关天培之托嘱，立志寻找时机保卫广州城。 故事从三元里村武馆教头刘三义（刘秋实饰）和其兄弟韦绍光（孙昊饰）企图烧毁十三行码头的洋商趸船开始... 影片质朴还原了三元里抗英这段鲜为人知的史实，用悲壮美学与历史质感交织的视听讲述了鸦片馆血案的个人复仇，到牛栏岗生死战的民族抗争。致敬民族先辈，当外侮侵犯时，每一个挺身而出的小人物，都是照亮民族暗夜的英雄。
